credentials.title: Connect to Nanit
credentials.description: Enter your Nanit account credentials. All cameras on this account will be added automatically.

data.store_credentials: Store email and password (enables easier re-authentication)

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Enter the verification code sent to your device.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Nanit
reauth_confirm.description: Your Nanit session has expired. Please log in again.

reauth_mfa.title: Re-authentication MFA
reauth_mfa.description: Enter the verification code sent to your device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Nanit cloud API

abort.already_configured: This Nanit account is already configured
abort.reauth_email_mismatch: The email address does not match the original account. Please use the same email.
abort.no_cameras: No cameras found on this Nanit account

init.title: Nanit Options
init.description: Select a camera to configure its local IP address.

camera_ip.title: Camera IP for {camera_name}
camera_ip.description: Enter the local IP address for **{camera_name}** for local-first connectivity. Leave blank to use cloud only.

camera_connection_failed.title: Nanit camera failed to connect
camera_connection_failed.description:
Camera **{camera_name}** could not be reached. It will be retried on next reload.

Error: {error}
